scene.scenePrompt: Dusk-lit opulent banquet hall, towering crystal chandeliers casting warm golden light and dancing shadows, polished marble floor reflecting chandelier glow. In the foreground left, Zhou Mingyuan in deep bow toward an empty corner, broken glass shards at his feet, lips slightly moving. Midground center, Zhou Wan'er stepping backward, eyes wide with terror fixed on the air behind her father. Background right, a twisted shadow face with a grinning maw emerging from distorted air, a claw-like hand of black mist reaching toward Zhou Wan'er's neck. Atmosphère thick with tension, elegant decor contrasting with supernatural horror. Vertical composition, cinematic lighting, soft focus on distant guests blurred in background.

beats.narration: The twilight glow spills through the French windows into the banquet hall, where guests laugh and chat under the crystal chandeliers. You hold a silver teapot, refilling a lady's cup. Suddenly, a sharp crash echoes—Zhou Mingyuan shatters his red wine glass on the floor. He bows deeply to an empty corner, murmuring in ancient Hebrew. The guests laugh awkwardly, assuming he is just drunk. But you see the air behind him warp into a grinning shadow face, as a hand condensed from black mist slowly reaches toward Zhou Wan'er's neck.

activeCharacters.name: Zhou Mingyuan
activeCharacters.pose: Bows deeply to the corner after shattering the wine glass, eyes hollow, lips moving slightly as he chants.

activeCharacters.name: Zhou Wan'er
activeCharacters.pose: Standing not far away, staring in terror at the shadow behind her father, instinctively stepping back.

activeCharacters.name: Demon Shadow
activeCharacters.pose: Warping into view from the air behind Zhou Mingyuan, grinning maliciously as it extends a hand of black mist toward Zhou Wan'er's neck.

beats.narration: Zhou Wan'er's eyes widen; she wants to scream but no sound comes out. She turns to look at you, her eyes filled with terror and a plea for help. The hand of black mist is now less than ten centimeters from her neck.

activeCharacters.name: Zhou Mingyuan
activeCharacters.pose: Still bowing and murmuring, his body trembling slightly.

activeCharacters.name: Zhou Wan'er
activeCharacters.pose: Eyes wide, turning to you for help, her lips pale.

activeCharacters.name: Demon Shadow
activeCharacters.pose: Grinning maliciously, its black hand about to touch Wan'er's neck.

beats.narration: Your grip on the teapot tightens. You know you must act before the guests notice.

activeCharacters.name: Zhou Mingyuan
activeCharacters.pose: Continues bowing and murmuring, black veins spreading across his wrist.

activeCharacters.name: Zhou Wan'er
activeCharacters.pose: Looking at you pleadingly, her body stiff.

activeCharacters.name: Demon Shadow
activeCharacters.pose: The black hand hovers by Wan'er's neck, its malicious grin widening.

effect.nextSceneSeed: The banquet hall falls into chaos. The sound of shattering teacups drowns out the demon's low growl, allowing you to protect Wan'er and retreat to the side hall.

beats.narration: With a slight twitch of your finger, an invisible ripple of light spreads from the base of the teapot, silently striking the hand of black mist. The Demon Shadow lets out a raspy shriek, and the black hand instantly retracts. Zhou Mingyuan's body jolts, and he snaps his head up, a flash of clarity in his eyes. But soon, the black veins crawl back onto his face. He turns to you, a bizarre smile curving his lips: 'Butler, you are indeed no ordinary man.' You realize the demon has noticed you, and you must complete the exorcism before you are completely exposed.

activeCharacters.name: Zhou Mingyuan
activeCharacters.pose: A flash of clarity crosses his eyes before he resumes his bizarre smile, black veins spreading across his face.

activeCharacters.name: Zhou Wan'er
activeCharacters.pose: Sighs in relief but remains hiding in the corner, watching you both with concern.

activeCharacters.name: Demon Shadow
activeCharacters.pose: Retreats behind Zhou Mingyuan, glaring at you viciously, its form distorting.

characters.name: Zhou Mingyuan
characters.voiceDescription: Male, around 30 years old. Deep, steady, and magnetic voice. His tone is calm with a hint of mystery and control. Moderate, unhurried pace. Standard Mandarin, occasionally with slight breathiness, fully showcasing the composure and restraint of a Hidden Realm agent.
characters.visualDescription: 30s male, short neat black hair, sharp intelligent dark eyes with a hint of mystic glow, angular jawline, fair complexion, tailored dark navy suit with subtle cyan pinstripes, crisp white dress shirt, silver cufflinks engraved with arcane symbols, black leather gloves, polished black oxford shoes, aura of calm authority and hidden power, modern urban fantasy aesthetic, charismatic and handsome.

characters.name: Zhou Wan'er
characters.voiceDescription: Female, around 25 years old. Cool, crisp, and slightly magnetic voice. Calm and composed personality. Steady and powerful pace, occasionally revealing a sense of mystery. Standard Mandarin with a slight British accent.
characters.visualDescription: young adult female, long straight black hair with subtle cyan highlights, sharp emerald eyes with a calm yet piercing gaze, porcelain skin, high cheekbones, tailored black women's suit with faint cyan magical runes embroidered on the edges, crisp white shirt underneath, minimalistic silver accessories, elegant and mysterious aura, urban fantasy mage aesthetic, charismatic and composed

characters.name: Demon Shadow
characters.voiceDescription: Male, early 30s. Deep, magnetic, and slightly raspy voice. Calm and steady, with a hidden sense of mystery and oppression. Unhurried pace, clear articulation, with a hint of a British gentleman's accent. Standard Mandarin.
characters.visualDescription: 30s male, short neat black hair, sharp dark eyes with a calm yet piercing gaze, clean-shaven, chiseled jawline, tailored charcoal grey suit with subtle silver pinstripes, crisp white dress shirt, slim black tie, polished leather oxford shoes, silver cufflinks engraved with occult symbols, a small glowing cyan amulet hidden beneath shirt, lean athletic build, charismatic and enigmatic aura, urban fantasy concept art, vertical composition

storyState.logline: As a Hidden Realm agent disguised as a butler, you must perform a silent exorcism amidst the clinking of glasses at a tea party where your employer is possessed by a demon. Otherwise, not only will the mission fail, but the entire high society will become the demon's hunting ground.
storyState.genreTags: Urban Fantasy / Suspense / Fast-Paced Twist Drama / Fast-Paced
storyState.protagonist: You are an agent of the Hidden Realm Administration, code-named 'Butler,' disguised as the personal butler of the wealthy Zhou Mingyuan. Right now, the tea party is in full swing, and you notice black veins appearing on your employer's fingertips—the demon possession has reached the middle stage. You must complete the exorcism ritual within 90 minutes without alarming the guests or exposing your identity. You want to complete the mission, but your employer's 10-year-old daughter, Zhou Wan'er, can see spirits, which has become your weakness.
storyState.castNotes:
Zhou Mingyuan: A business tycoon whose behavior becomes bizarre due to demon possession. Sometimes lucid, sometimes manic. He has an exploitative employer-butler relationship with you, and the demon inside him is trying to seize control of his body.
Zhou Wan'er: Zhou Mingyuan's 10-year-old daughter. Born with spiritual vision, she can see spirits invisible to ordinary people. She is full of curiosity about you, becoming a variable in your actions.
Lin Xue: An agent from another faction of the Hidden Realm, the 'Lingshu Pavilion.' Disguised as a guest to get close to Zhou Mingyuan, she seems to have other motives. She is a colleague but holds an opposing stance.
storyState.synopsis: At the tea party, Zhou Mingyuan is possessed by a demon, shattering his glass in public and bowing to the air while chanting. The Demon Shadow appears and reaches out to attack Zhou Wan'er. You secretly intervene to stop it, but the demon senses that you are no ordinary butler. Your identity is exposed, and Zhou Mingyuan summons you to the study.
openThreads: What is the demon's true purpose? Why did it choose Zhou Mingyuan and attack Wan'er?
Lin Xue has not yet appeared; the Lingshu Pavilion's involvement remains an unknown variable.
You have been exposed, and you must find a way to completely exorcise the demon during the confrontation in the study.
relationships: Zhou Mingyuan: Employer. Deeply possessed by the demon, he has begun to suspect your true identity, his emotions switching between lucidity and madness.
Zhou Wan'er: Employer's daughter. Possesses spiritual vision, views you as her protector, and relies on and trusts you.
Demon Shadow: An unknown entity possessing Zhou Mingyuan. Its target seems to be Zhou Wan'er, and it has identified you as a threat.
storyState.nextHook: Next Scene: In the study, Zhou Mingyuan confronts you. The demon attempts to completely take over his body, and you must complete the exorcism without harming your employer.

worldSetting:
This is an AI interactive story game geared towards a 【Male-oriented】 audience, featuring intense dramatic conflicts and rapid twists in the style of Hongguo short videos.
Story Style: Multi-line twists. Pace: Tight and exhilarating.
Opening setting of the featured story 'Hidden Realm Butler': He is an ordinary butler in a modern metropolis, but his true identity is an agent of the 'Hidden Realm' Administration, responsible for dealing with anomalous creatures lurking in human society. When the wealthy employer he serves is possessed by a demon, he must complete an invisible exorcism ritual between the tea party and the dinner banquet.
Please cut directly into this opening to give the player a strong sense of immersion and instant gratification; subsequent branches should maintain the twist density of short dramas, allowing players to see immediate repercussions for every choice they make.
styleGuide: Urban fantasy concept art, vertical composition. A charismatic, handsome modern mage in a tailored suit, casting a glowing cyan spell that reveals a magical spiral staircase ascending into the rain-slicked city streets.
